meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-01 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A full night to reset — 7h19 (score 84), up +5 on yesterday, off a genuinely early 21:48 lights-out. Deep 1h20, light 4h14 and a strong REM 1h45 (the short night before had cut REM to 0h55), with only 21m awake — so both the duration and the architecture came back. The one soft note is the autonomic read: HRV eased to 37 (−11 vs yesterday's 48 and −4 under the 7-day baseline of 41) and RHR ticked up to 55 (+2), while morning stress stayed low at 18. An HRV dip after a good sleep usually reflects the week's accumulated load catching up rather than the night itself, so read it as a nudge, not a warning. Today's plan is swim intervals — a good fit: steady aerobic work is exactly what a well-rested but slightly soft-HRV morning wants. Keep the hard 200s honest but don't force the pace, and the full night has you set for a clean session.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Puna noć za reset — 7h19 (ocjena 84), +5 na jučer, uz stvarno rano lijeganje u 21:48. Duboki 1h20, lagani 4h14 i snažan REM 1h45 (prethodna kratka noć srezala je REM na 0h55), uz samo 21m budnosti — vratili su se i trajanje i struktura sna. Jedina slabija nota je autonomni pokazatelj: HRV je pao na 37 (−11 vs jučerašnjih 48 i −4 ispod 7-dnevne osnovice 41), a RHR se popeo na 55 (+2), dok je jutarnji stres ostao nizak na 18. Pad HRV-a nakon dobrog sna obično odražava nakupljeno tjedno opterećenje, a ne samu noć — pa ga čitaj kao poticaj, ne upozorenje. Današnji plan su intervali plivanja — dobar izbor: mirni aerobni rad je upravo ono što odmorno, ali blago mekano-HRV jutro traži. Drži teške 200-ice pošteno, ali ne forsiraj tempo — puna noć te je dobro pripremila za čistu sesiju.
